articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (Mar. 4)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 1210 Washington St. One-family Colonial, built in 1950, 1,040 square feet, 6 rooms, 2 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 14,792-square-foot lot. $500,000 61 Monroe St. One-family Colonial, built in 1901, 1,358 square feet, 6 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 9,375-square-foot lot. $363,581 ACTON 7 Concetta Circle. One-family Colonial, built in 1988, 2,726 square feet, […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (Mar. 4) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington home sales include a Colonial for $500,000 on Washington St.
Acton features a 2,726-square-foot Colonial sold recently, enhancing local property values.
Increased home sales indicate a competitive real estate market in Greater Boston.
